productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Black Sandals
description: sandals for men, now with a classy finish - these sandals are the best in-season casual footwear! U.S. Polo knows what it's doing when it comes to fusing style with comfort, these leather sandals will keep your feet snug and comfy, while ensuring you'll look dapper at any casual occasion! Upper Straps on the forefoot and midfoot Ankle strap looping around the ankle with a Velcro closure to customise the Fit Padded footbed Outsole TPU outsole with a raised heel and deep flex grooves Sandal care Wipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust Use a leather conditioner and a brush for added shine
